mnemonics.title: 7 Wonders
mnemonics.content: 7 multiplications beat 8 - like 7 ancient wonders outperforming 8 ordinary structures

mnemonics.title: Log₂7
mnemonics.content: Remember log base 2 of 7 ≈ 2.81 for exponent in complexity

acronyms.expansion: Subdivide, Transform, Recursively Add, Subtract, Seven Equations Needed

visualTips.visualization: Imagine dividing chessboard into four smaller boards repeatedly
Picture Russian nesting dolls with smaller matrices inside

analogies.analogy: Like breaking a large pizza into slices, cooking separately, then combining
